bankrliq-pool-finder.description: Uniswap V3 pool finder for Base and Robinhood Chain. Pass token0+token1 for an exact pair, only token0 for a CA search (pairs it with WETH + the chain stable), or nothing for WETH/stable defaults. Returns pools with live TVL, 24h volume sampled from Swap logs, fees and APR estimates. Used by the Bankr Liquidity Manager app; agent-friendly.

pools.description: [{ fee, address, tickSpacing, token0:{address,symbol,decimals}, token1:{...}, tick, liquidity, price0In1, price1In0, tvlUsd, vol24hUsd, fees24hUsd, aprEst, volNote }]

bankrliq-close-all.description: Close MULTIPLE Uniswap V3 LP positions in ONE transaction (Base + Robinhood Chain). Every position's decreaseLiquidity + collect + burn is packed into a single NonfungiblePositionManager.multicall, so the wallet signs exactly once. Returns txBlobs with raw {chain,to,data,value} calldata; nothing is signed server-side. Used by the Bankr Liquidity Manager app.

recipient.description: wallet that receives all tokens and fees (required)

txBlobs.description: single entry — one multicall closing everything

skipped.description: token ids that could not be included, with reasons

bankrliq-liq-action.description: Uniswap V3 LP transaction preparer for Base and Robinhood Chain. Actions: mint (approvals + mint, sign in order), decrease, collect, burn, close (decreaseLiquidity + collect [+ burn] as ONE multicall = one signature). Returns txBlobs: [{label, blob, raw}] — 'raw' is {chain,to,data,value} calldata any agent can sign with its own wallet. Nothing is signed server-side. Used by the Bankr Liquidity Manager app.

burn.description: close: burn the NFT at 100% (default true)

txBlobs.description: [{ label, blob, raw: { chain, to, data, value } }] — sign in order
